name: Proofpoint Shadow (Illusive)
description: Agentless deception platform (formerly Illusive Networks) using 75+ deceptive techniques on endpoints to detect lateral movement and identity threats

actions.name: List Incidents
actions.description: List all detected deception incidents with forensics timelines

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max number of incidents to return

actions.name: Get Incident Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed incident information including forensics timeline and attacker activity

actions.name: Get Incident Forensics
actions.description: Collect on-demand forensics data for an incident including process trees and network connections

actions.name: Get Attack Surface Insights
actions.description: Retrieve attack surface analysis showing credential exposure, shadow admins, and lateral movement paths

actions.name: List Deceptive Entities
actions.description: List all deployed deceptive entities (fake credentials, files, connections)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by entity type: credential, file, connection, share

actions.name: List Deception Policies
actions.description: List all deception policies governing entity deployment and behavior
